## GE Vernova Q2 revenue beats estimates; full-year outlook modestly raised

GEV is a direct proxy for power infrastructure demand tied to AI data center buildout; a beat-and-raise in this context signals that hyperscaler capex is translating into real equipment orders. Raised full-year guidance strengthens conviction that the data center power cycle is durable, not front-loaded.

- GE Vernova (GEV) reported Q2 CY2026 sales above analyst estimates.
- Full-year guidance was raised, coming in slightly above prior expectations.
- Two-outlet confirmation (FinancialContent, TradingView) consistent on both data points.
- No specific revenue figure or growth rate is provided in the headlines.
